desc_ar: إنجليزي بسيط عن التواصل في العمل: الإيميل، المكالمة، والرسالة.
why_ar: لتتعلّم كلمات الإنجليزي التي تستخدمها لترسل إيميل وتردّ على مكالمة في العمل.
outcomes: تقرأ نصاً بسيطاً عن التواصل في العمل
تتعلّم كلمات: email, message, meeting, reply
تتعلّم زمن المستقبل will و going to
warmup: من آخر شخص كلّمته في الهاتف؟

grammar.explain_ar: نستخدم will للقرارات السريعة والعروض التي تقررها في نفس اللحظة. ونستخدم be going to للخطط التي رتّبتها من قبل. تذكّر: will + الفعل الأساسي، و am/is/are going to + الفعل الأساسي.
grammar.explain_en_html:
will for a quick decision or an offer you make now.
The phone is ringing. I will answer it.

going to for a plan you decided before.
We are going to have a meeting tomorrow.
grammar.formula: will + verb  ·  am/is/are going to + verb

examples.sentence: I will send the email now.
We are going to have a meeting tomorrow.
The phone is ringing. I will answer it.

mistakes.wrong: I will to send the email.
mistakes.explanation_ar: بعد will يأتي الفعل الأساسي مباشرة بدون to.

mistakes.wrong: We will going to have a meeting.
mistakes.correct: We are going to have a meeting.
mistakes.explanation_ar: لا نجمع will مع going to. اختر واحداً فقط.

items.question: The phone is ringing. I ___ answer it.
items.explanation_ar: قرار سريع في نفس اللحظة، لذلك نستخدم will.

items.question: We ___ have a big meeting next Monday. It is on the calendar.
items.explanation_ar: خطة رتّبناها من قبل، لذلك نستخدم are going to.

items.question: That bag looks heavy. I ___ help you.
items.explanation_ar: عرض مساعدة الآن، لذلك نستخدم will.

readings.label: A
paragraphs: Omar works in a small office in the city. Today he must write an important *email* to a client. He opens his computer and starts to type. First, he writes a polite *greeting* at the top. Then he explains the *problem* with the last order. Omar is careful because a good *message* helps the company look professional.

His manager says, 'I will *check* your email before you send it.' Omar smiles and says thank you. He knows a clear email is very important at *work*. He reads it again and fixes two small mistakes. Then he adds a friendly *reply* line at the end. He also writes his phone number under his name.

Finally, Omar clicks *send*. The client will get the email in one minute. Tomorrow they are going to have a short *meeting* about the new plan. Omar feels happy and *confident*. He is going to write more emails next week.

questions.question_en: What is the passage mainly about?
choices: Omar writes an important work email
questions.correct_answer: Omar writes an important work email
questions.explanation_ar: النص كله عن كتابة عمر لإيميل عمل مهم.

questions.question_en: Who will check Omar's email before he sends it?
questions.question_ar: من سيراجع إيميل عمر قبل أن يرسله؟
questions.explanation_ar: المدير قال إنه سيراجع الإيميل قبل الإرسال.

questions.question_en: What does Omar write first in the email?
questions.question_ar: ما أول شيء يكتبه عمر في الإيميل؟
questions.explanation_ar: كتب أولاً تحية مهذّبة في الأعلى.

questions.question_en: Why is Omar careful with his email?
questions.question_ar: لماذا يكون عمر حريصاً في إيميله؟
choices: Because a good message helps the company
questions.correct_answer: Because a good message helps the company
questions.explanation_ar: لأن الرسالة الجيدة تساعد الشركة وتجعلها تبدو محترفة.

questions.question_en: What can we guess about Omar?
questions.explanation_ar: يراجع الإيميل ويصلح الأخطاء، فهو يهتم بعمله.

questions.question_en: When are they going to have a short meeting?

vocab: a message you send on a computer
He sends an email to the client.
polite words you say at the start
something that is wrong or hard
There is a small problem with the order.
A clear message helps the company.
to look at something to see if it is right
The manager will check the email.
a job or the place you do your job
He adds a friendly reply line.
to make something go to another person
when people come together to talk
They will have a short meeting.

readings.label: B
paragraphs: Sara works at the front desk of a busy company. Her main job is to answer the *phone*. When it rings, she picks it up quickly and says a warm *hello*. She is always *polite* to every *caller*. Today a man calls and asks about a delivery. Sara listens with care and writes a short *note*.

The man wants to speak to the manager. Sara says, 'One moment, please. I will *transfer* your call now.' But the manager is not free. So Sara offers help. 'He is in a meeting. I am going to take a *message* for you,' she says. The man gives his name and *number*. Sara promises the manager will call back soon.

Sara ends the call in a kind way. She says, 'Thank you for calling. Have a nice day.' A good phone *voice* makes clients feel happy. Sara knows this skill is very useful at work. Next month she is going to teach a new worker how to answer *calls*.

questions.question_en: What is Sara's main job in the passage?
questions.question_ar: ما عمل سارة الرئيسي في النص؟
questions.explanation_ar: عملها الرئيسي هو الردّ على الهاتف بأدب.

questions.question_en: What does Sara do when the phone rings?
questions.question_ar: ماذا تفعل سارة عندما يرنّ الهاتف؟
choices: She picks it up quickly and says hello
questions.correct_answer: She picks it up quickly and says hello

questions.question_en: Why does Sara take a message?
choices: Because the manager is in a meeting
questions.correct_answer: Because the manager is in a meeting
questions.explanation_ar: المدير مشغول في اجتماع، لذلك تأخذ رسالة.

questions.question_en: What does the man give Sara?
What does Sara say at the end of the call?
questions.question_ar: ماذا تقول سارة في نهاية المكالمة؟
questions.explanation_ar: تنهي المكالمة بلطف وتقول شكراً لاتصالك.

questions.question_en: What can we guess about Sara's phone skill?
questions.question_ar: ماذا نستنتج عن مهارة سارة في الهاتف؟
choices: It is useful and she can teach it
questions.correct_answer: It is useful and she can teach it

vocab: a machine you use to call people
Her job is to answer the phone.
a word you say to greet someone
a person who is calling on the phone
She is polite to every caller.
a short piece of writing to remember
to move a call to another person
I am going to take a message.
the sound you make when you speak
A good phone voice helps clients.
She will teach a worker to answer calls.

listening.transcript: Hi, I'm Khalid. I work in an office. This morning I will write three emails to our clients. First, I am going to answer the phone calls. My boss says a polite message is very important. In the afternoon, we are going to have a short meeting. I love my job because I talk to people every day.

exercises.question_en: How many emails will Khalid write this morning?
What is Khalid mostly talking about?
What are they going to have in the afternoon?
Why does Khalid love his job?
options: He talks to people every day
exercises.explanation_ar: يحب عمله لأنه يتحدث مع الناس كل يوم.

exercises.question_en: What does Khalid's boss say is important?
exercises.explanation_ar: قال المدير إن الرسالة المهذّبة مهمة جداً.

writing.prompt_en: Write a short work email to a client. Say hello, give one clear message, and end in a polite way.
writing.prompt_ar: اكتب إيميل عمل قصير إلى زبون. سلّم عليه، أعطِ رسالة واحدة واضحة، وأنهِ الإيميل بطريقة مهذّبة.
hints: I will send... / We are going to...

speaking.prompt_en: Talk about how you communicate at work or school. Do you write emails? Do you answer calls?
speaking.prompt_ar: تحدث عن كيف تتواصل في العمل أو الدراسة. هل تكتب إيميلات؟ هل تردّ على المكالمات؟
prep: حضّر كلمات: email, call, message, meeting
رتّب: ماذا تفعل أولاً وماذا بعده
